top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND results.statusId != 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
JOIN status ON results.statusId = status.statusId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND status.status != 'Finished';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND results.statusId != 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
INNER JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
INNER JOIN status ON results.statusId = status.statusId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND status.status NOT LIKE '%Finished%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
JOIN status ON results.statusId = status.statusId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND status.status != 'Finished';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND results.statusId != 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
INNER JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
INNER JOIN status ON results.statusId = status.statusId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND status.status NOT LIKE '%Finished%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
INNER JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND results.statusId <> 1;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM drivers 
JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId 
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Italian' 
AND results.statusId != 1;
